ui_evaluation: Pro-tier aesthetics, consistent branding, and smooth animations. Fully responsive and theme-aware.

items: Loading skeletons for Order History and Tracking views to prevent layout shift.
Interactive form validation (visual cues on inputs while typing, not just on submit).
Success animations (e.g., Lottie or Framer Motion) after placing an order.
missing_elements.suggestion: implment the animation by making three bubbles moving around the a box then they pop if it is done loading :)

items: Pull-to-refresh functionality for the Order History list (critical for APK/Mobile).
Confirmation modals for critical actions (Logout, Cancel Order).
In-app onboarding guide/tour for users logging in for the first time.
missing_elements.suggestion: For the onboarding guide, consider a simple step-by-step overlay that highlights key features and navigation points when a user first opens the app.

items: Support/Live Chat interface within the app.
Detailed billing/receipt view for past orders.

technical_integrity: Passes linting and build checks. APK v1.7.0 is fully bundled with the latest UI fixes and assets.
